name: Dead Coin Revival Watcher
description: Tracks dead or quiet tokens showing unusual activity, social revival, wallet rotation, or volume spikes.
degenPitch: Zombie coin twitched. Maybe nothing. Maybe not.
whatItDoes: Watches quiet tokens for unusual activity.
Flags volume, wallet, and social revival signals.
cursorPrompt: Build a Dead Coin Revival Watcher using DNA x402. Watch quiet tokens for unusual volume, wallet rotation, and social revival. Gate premium alerts with receipts and avoid pump coordination.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Dead Coin Revival Watcher using DNA x402. Watch quiet tokens for unusual volume, wallet rotation, and social revival. Gate premium alerts with receipts and avoid pump coordination.
